contato-descricao: Feel free to reach out or send me a message
contato-resumo:
I’m interested in freelance opportunities. However,
 if you have other request or question, don’t 
 hesitate to contact me
about-paragraph-1: I am a fullstack developer focused on backend development, interested in building robust, scalable, and well-structured applications.
about-paragraph-2: I have experience developing APIs and web systems using technologies such as Java, Spring Boot, and JavaScript. I enjoy working with software architecture, code organization, and development best practices.
about-paragraph-3: I am always seeking to learn new technologies and improve my skills to create efficient solutions that solve real-world problems.

projects.title: projects
projects.subtitle: My works
projects.project-1-description: A system developed to optimize business process management and organization, streamlining activity control, workflow, and decision-making.
projects.project-2-description: A web solution that transforms order, inventory, and menu management for community restaurants in Contagem.
projects.project-3-description: A web solution to help children track their plants' growth, promoting environmental education and a connection with nature.

smallprojects.project-1-description: Bot to automate messages on Whatsapp using the Baileys library.
smallprojects.project-2-description: Random password generator with customization options.
smallprojects.project-3-description: Application to convert values between different currencies using an exchange API.
smallprojects.project-4-description: Application to manage daily tasks with features to add, edit and delete.

job-description-1: Worked in IT technical support, performing hardware and software maintenance and assisting users in resolving issues related to systems and equipment. Also collaborated in supporting the organization's network infrastructure. Additionally participated in the development of a process management application using NestJS, contributing to the implementation of features and supporting the system's development.
job-description-2: Worked in the sales department, assisting with inventory control and organization, spreadsheet management, and customer service. Also contributed to organizing commercial information and supporting the administrative activities of the department.
